principle: Start consolidated. Split only when a module needs independent operational life.

governance.repo_creation_rule: Do not create a new repo for every doctrine. Keep related doctrines inside one operational repo until separation is justified by deployment, contributors, permissions, release cycle, or governance.
governance.lightweight_rule: No raw HAPI data, secrets, private memory, database dumps, large binaries, live logs, or confidential value records in GitHub.
governance.integration_rule: ABBA MAS is the integration, swarm, open-source, white-label, AI, AI agent, API, SDK, low-hassle and free-product command center.
governance.pulse_value_rule: PULSE and VALUE remain together because their relationship is the measurable economic engine. Pulse is tokenized; token is classified; value is created after classification.

core_repositories.name: abba-mas
core_repositories.description: ABBA master AI swarm resolver and integration command center for open-source, white-label, AI agents, APIs, SDKs, low-hassle tools, free tools, swarms, registries, and ecosystem integration paths.

core_repositories.name: actual-value-engine
core_repositories.description: Combined PULSE and VALUE engine for universal value accounting, token classification, asset-liability inversion, loss recovery, value creation, replenishment, and the measurable relationship between PULSE and VALUE.

core_repositories.name: hapi-protocol
core_repositories.description: Human API protocol for # formation, HAPI identity, entry, consent, SEAL, AI assignment, personal AI core, and function capsules.

core_repositories.name: ecosystem-governance
core_repositories.description: Master governance, repo lattice, SEAL policy, public/private boundary, ATLAS, Vault, documentation, and ecosystem architecture.

core_repositories.name: carbonactual-sdk
core_repositories.description: Developer SDKs, API clients, adapters, event helpers, integration helpers, and app-facing tools for ecosystem integration.

core_repositories.name: entity-graph
core_repositories.description: Graph layer for HAPI, products, companies, apps, groups, organizations, tools, roots, values, pulses, swarms, and integration relationships.

deferred_rule: Deferred repos remain modules inside the consolidated core until scale, permissions, independent deployment, or governance requires separation.
